findings.problem: agent tool or configuration trust surface requires supply-chain evidence
findings.agent_fix: pin and review agent tools, MCP servers, hooks, and rule files; keep untrusted tool output separate from trusted policy

findings.problem: workflow inlines CI commands instead of delegating to ops/ci/*.sh

findings.reason: without a single source of truth, local runs drift from CI and breakage is only visible after push
